title: Sonic Boom Effect
description: Adds realistic sonic boom visual effects to Minecraft - break the sound barrier while flying with elytra with high-speed movement!
body:
# SONIC BOOM EFFECT
![player flying with elytra](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a3ba72a20857e0cdf9a736703ca50651ddc2141.gif)

### Break the sound barrier and unleash spectacular sonic boom particle effects!

## How it Works
- Fly at high speed with your elytra to trigger the sonic boom effect
- Earn the achievement and receive the **Egle Statue** as a reward on your first sonic boom
- Effect has a 1-minute cooldown between uses

**Require Fabric API**
